prompt: Create a surreal high-fashion studio editorial photograph featuring a glamorous young woman with long dark wavy hair and warm medium skin seated on a plush pink faux-fur armchair in an all-pink fur-lined set. She wears an oversized voluminous bubblegum pink faux-fur coat draped around her body, bare legs crossed elegantly, and sparkling pink pointed stiletto heels. She holds a clear glass bottle filled with milk in both hands at her lap and looks calmly into the camera with a poised fashion-model expression. Beside her, a cream-colored calf leans in from the right, resting its head affectionately on the chair arm and close to her shoulder; show the animal’s full head, neck, torso, and front legs, natural and realistic. The entire environment is monochrome pink: fuzzy wall backdrop, fuzzy floor, and rounded furry chair, with rich tactile texture everywhere. Use glossy magazine fashion photography styling, surreal luxury dairy concept, soft yet directional studio lighting from upper left, gentle shadows, warm highlights on skin and fur, shallow depth of field, realistic proportions, high detail, shot on a 50mm fashion editorial lens, square 1:1 crop, centered composition, no text, no logos, no watermark.
